## Why It Works

This template targets a very specific audience — high-performing employees considering a new path — and highlights benefits they might not get in their current role: flexibility, income potential, ownership, and work-life balance. The skill transfer framing makes the leap feel achievable.

## Template

[Target Group] should consider [New Opportunity or Path].
More [Benefit 1], [Benefit 2], [Benefit 3], and [Benefit 4].
If you're great at [Current Role or Skill], you'll probably be great at [New Role or Skill].

## Example

Creative marketers should consider freelance consulting.
More creative freedom, diverse project opportunities, control over your workload, and the chance to build a personal brand.
If you're great at marketing in a corporate job, you'll probably excel in consulting.
